name: SCC_PreSendInd
title: SCC_PreSendInd
syntax: void SCC_PreSendInd ( byte SessionID[], dword MessageID, char ResponseCode[] )
description: The callback is called in active mode before a response message is sent. It enables checking the message’s response code and, if desired, overwriting it with another value. Additionally, overwriting the following parameters is supported:

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF
